title: derris stuhlmannii
intro: Derris stuhlmannii, a plant species native to tropical Africa, is also known as the "Pithyopetalum stuhlmannii" or "Pithyopetalum derris", and belongs to the family Menispermaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic activities. Its health benefits include treating various ailments such as fever, malaria, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a natural insecticide and antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including a paste or a decoction, which are often used in traditional medicine in Africa.
